findings.criterion: Scenario validates that dropping a product into the cart display results in the product's title, unit price, and quantity appearing in the cart (covering behavior 3.normal_show_unit_price_in_box3).

evidence.quote: the product title appears in .box2, the unit price in .box3, and the quantity in .box1.
When the user drags the product with data-testid "product-item-1" and drops it into the cart container with data-testid "drop-area"

findings.reasoning: The scenario provides the relevant precondition (product visible), the core user action (drag-and-drop into the drop-area), and asserts the cart display shows the product title, price, and quantity. These Then assertions observe the unit price in the cart UI (expressed as "$40") which satisfies the contract that the dropped product's unit price becomes visible in the cart display. Although the scenario does not name the specific selector ".box3", it unambiguously checks the cart display's price after the drop, which fulfills the observable required by the behavior contract.
